---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Codex CLI Ultimate
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## 🚀 Feature Description

What would you like to see added? Clear and concise description.

## 💡 Problem It Solves

What problem does this feature solve? E.g., "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## 🎯 Proposed Solution

How do you envision this working? Be as specific as possible.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## 📋 Additional Context

- Is this related to an existing feature (profiles, agents, prompts, scripts, docs)?
- Would this require changes to configs, scripts, or both?
- Screenshots, examples, or references to similar projects are welcome.
